name: US President
title: President of the United States

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Transatlantic alliance and shared democratic values
Treaty alliance and Indo-Pacific strategic alignment
Great-power competition across technology, trade, and military domains
Deep adversarial posture over European security
Nuclear proliferation threat and hostile posture

biography: A composite representation of US presidential leadership, blending institutional power with democratic constraints. The ENTJ archetype reflects the decisive, strategic command style expected of American presidents, tempered by congressional checks and electoral cycles. Pursues a rules-based international order while balancing domestic economic pressures.
